creator: linimon@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

Please help us out by putting the category/portname in the Synopsis. 

Also, as per the Porter's Handbook, please send all updates as diff -u 
output.  It's fine to just do a followup to this PR with it.  This way, 
ports committers can more easily see what has changed. 

mcl
